title: Stigmatopteris heterophlebia
intro: Stigmatopteris heterophlebia, also known as the Heterophlebia fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, exhibiting potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in treating various conditions including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Stigmatopteris heterophlebia include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and ointments.
